mapper.select: SELECT icategory boardId, name FROM board_category WHERE icategory = #{boardId}

SELECT a.iboard boardId, a.title, c.unm nm, a.created_at createdAt FROM board a INNER JOIN board_category b ON a.icategory = b.icategory INNER JOIN user c ON a.iuser = c.iuser WHERE b.icategory = #{categoryId}

SELECT b.name boardCategoryName, a.title, a.contents, c.unm writer, a.created_at createdAt, a.updated_at updatedAt FROM board a INNER JOIN board_category b ON a.icategory = b.icategory INNER JOIN user c ON a.iuser = c.iuser WHERE a.iboard = #{boardId}
